SANDOVAL COUNTY, NM

With the best schools in the state, the safest cities, a low cost of living, diverse population and competitive incentive programs, Sandoval County is emerging as a top choice for business expansion.

CLICK HERE TO DISCOVER SANDOVAL COUNTY

Welcome to the fastest
growing community
in New Mexico

Located in the Albuquerque Metro Area, Sandoval County boasts approximately 300 days of sunshine per year with little to no risk of natural disasters.

EXPLORE

LOCATE



KEY INDUSTRIES

Explore the industries that thrive here, and which ones are positioned for growth



INCENTIVES

Discover our unique, competitive incentive programs for relocation and expansion

CITY POPULATION

Little-to-no natural disasters

Low-Risk Location

An educated, growing workforce, a low cost of doing business and more. Visit the data center to find everything you need to know about Rio Rancho and Sandoval County.

DATA CENTER

START

Sandoval County Small Business Advisor – Provides information on numerous topics related to planning, starting, managing, and growing your business. It easily enables you to explore business topics of your interest. You will discover a roadmap of tasks and processes entrepreneurs can take to be successful.

GET STARTED

GROW

Our Business Retention & Expansion Program – CORE – supports and assists local economic-base companies with growth, sustainability, and resources to help them achieve their operational goals. Click below to learn more about CORE, get started with our R&E Services, or request a site visit from our R&E Team.

GET STARTED

START

Sandoval County Small Business Advisor – Provides information on numerous topics related to planning, starting, managing, and growing your business.
